programme.title: ⭐⭐ 1.2m @ 15s OFFSHORE

programme.title: 🌊 1.4m @ 11s CROSS
programme.desc:
Should be alright, the 1.4m swell should offer a few rideable shoulders before the wind ruins it.
🌊 Swell: 1.4m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 9.0km/h S (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 18.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m

programme.title: 🌊 1.4m @ 11s CROSS
programme.desc:
Supertubos will be offering up some 1.4m ramps today; hopefully the wind doesn't ruin them.
🌊 Swell: 1.4m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 5.0km/h WNW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 12.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 1.4m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
The 1.4m swell might offer a ride or two before the onshore wind turns it into a washing machine.
🌊 Swell: 1.4m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 5.0km/h WNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 12.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 1.4m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
That 1.4m swell with onshore wind? Likely a washing machine out there today.
🌊 Swell: 1.4m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 5.0km/h WNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 12.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 1.4m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
That 1.4m swell and onshore breeze suggests some choppy wedges that'll close out before you know it.
🌊 Swell: 1.4m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 5.0km/h WNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 12.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 1.4m @ 11s CROSS
programme.desc:
That 1.4m swell with a crosswind smells like a bumpy paddle and a few closeouts, maybe I'll just watch the tourists.
🌊 Swell: 1.4m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 5.0km/h WNW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 12.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 1.4m @ 11s CROSS
programme.desc:
Lagide's 1.4m swell with that wind suggests a session of battling chop for the committed, or maybe a very long walk.
🌊 Swell: 1.4m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 5.0km/h WNW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 12.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 1.3m @ 11s CROSS
programme.desc:
That 1.3m swell will offer a few, but that cross wind might keep things interesting in a 'character-building' kind of way.
🌊 Swell: 1.3m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 7.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 18.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m

programme.title: ⭐⭐ 1.3m @ 11s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
At 1.3m and offshore, Supertubos could offer something rideable today, provided you enjoy a barrel or three.
🌊 Swell: 1.3m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 9.0km/h N (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 19.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind
